---
title: "How it works"
description: "The concepts that make everything else make sense — read once, apply everywhere."
order: 0
---

- [One data format: MuData](mudata.qmd) — why components snap together.
- [Built with Viash · run on Viash Hub](viash.qmd) — how components are packaged and launched.
- [Many samples at once: the `param_list`](param-list.qmd) — process a cohort in one run.
- [The pipeline model](pipeline-model.qmd) — the four-step shape, and how packages extend it.

## The four-step model

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Ingestion] --> B[Process samples] --> C[Integration] --> D[Downstream]
```

Spatial data follows the same shape with spatial-aware steps; GPU
(`openpipeline_rapids`) and QC (`openpipeline_qc`) components slot into existing
steps; turnkey pipelines (`openpipeline_composed`) wrap the whole thing.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Advanced: the data-state view
Under the hood, processing is organized by the *state of the data*
(single-sample → multi-sample → merged → integrated). An optional deep-dive for
pipeline authors — to be ported from the current architecture page.
:::
